```shell
  @ val delegationToRevokePath = s"/tmp/canton/certs/delegation_to_revoke.tx"
      delegationToRevokePath : String = "/tmp/canton/certs/delegation_to_revoke.tx"

  @ participant1.topology.namespace_delegations.list(TopologyStoreId.Authorized).find(_.item.target == intermediateKey).get.toTopologyTransaction.writeToFile(delegationToRevokePath)
```
